title: Add blind-box content model and compatibility mapping contract
description: Introduce the static content-model layer for blind-box item authoring: 20 scene entries, five-layer bundle schema, and a deterministic mapping contract back to legacy runtime buckets. Prefer a small data/helper module or clearly isolated section in blind_boxes.py so the existing BLIND_BOXES consumer contract remains intact.
convergence: 20 scene entries are represented with stable Chinese names and pilot markers.
Five-layer keys are defined: core_items, support_items, visible_small_items, conditional_items, blocked_or_risky.
Compatibility mapping produces legacy keys large, medium, small, hanging.
blocked_or_risky has no default mapping target.
No UI or history behavior changes are introduced.
